questions.question: Does the 'Install Tauri CLI' step exist and use 'cargo install tauri-cli --version "^2"' to ensure Tauri v2 compatibility?
questions.actionable_check: Read .github/workflows/release.yml and confirm a step named 'Install Tauri CLI' exists before 'Build release' with the correct cargo install command
evidence_required: Exact step content from release.yml showing cargo install tauri-cli
questions.pass_criteria: Step exists before Build release and installs tauri-cli with version constraint ^2

questions.question: Does the 'Build release' step use 'cargo tauri build --target ...' instead of 'cargo build'?
questions.actionable_check: Read .github/workflows/release.yml and confirm Build release step uses 'cargo tauri build --target ${{ matrix.target }}' without cd src-tauri or --release flag
evidence_required: Exact Build release step content showing cargo tauri build
questions.pass_criteria: Build release step contains 'cargo tauri build --target' at project root (no 'cd src-tauri')

questions.question: Does the Package macOS step add DMG artifact handling with SHA256 checksum?
questions.actionable_check: Read .github/workflows/release.yml and confirm Package macOS step navigates to bundle/dmg/, runs shasum on the .dmg, and moves both the .dmg and .dmg.sha256 six levels up
evidence_required: Exact Package macOS step content showing DMG handling
questions.pass_criteria: Step includes: cd ../dmg, DMG_FILE=$(ls *.dmg), shasum -a 256, mv with 6-level relative path

questions.question: Does the Upload release assets step include *.dmg and *.dmg.sha256 in the files list?
questions.actionable_check: Read .github/workflows/release.yml and confirm the files section under Upload release assets has *.dmg and *.dmg.sha256 entries alongside existing tar.gz entries
evidence_required: Exact files section from Upload release assets step
questions.pass_criteria: Files section contains both '*.dmg' and '*.dmg.sha256' entries

questions.question: Does the release body reference .dmg files with correct Textbrush naming pattern and include drag-to-Applications instructions?
questions.actionable_check: Read .github/workflows/release.yml body section and verify it references Textbrush_x.y.z_aarch64.dmg pattern and includes 'drag Textbrush to Applications' step
evidence_required: Exact macOS section of release body
questions.pass_criteria: Body references .dmg files with Textbrush naming and includes drag-to-Applications and Gatekeeper bypass instructions

questions.question: Is the Linux packaging step unchanged from the original?
questions.actionable_check: Compare Package Linux step against original (git diff HEAD -- .github/workflows/release.yml) and confirm no changes to the Linux packaging logic
evidence_required: Git diff output for Linux packaging section
questions.pass_criteria: Package Linux step is identical to the original (tar -czf, sha256sum, mv)

mandatory_questions.question: Does the file contain all expected structural changes: Install Tauri CLI step, updated Build release step, updated Package macOS step, updated Upload files list, and updated release body?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Count and confirm all 5 modifications are present in the file
evidence_required: Line numbers or content for each modified section
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All 5 changes are present: new Install step, cargo tauri build, DMG in Package macOS, *.dmg in Upload files, .dmg mentions in body

mandatory_questions.question: Are the relative path depths in the mv commands correct? macOS should use 6 levels (../../../../../..) and Linux should remain unchanged (../../../../..)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Read the Package macOS and Package Linux steps and count the number of '../' segments in each mv command
evidence_required: Exact mv commands with path from both Package macOS and Package Linux steps
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: macOS tar.gz uses ../../../../../.. (6 levels), DMG uses ../../../../../.. (6 levels), Linux uses ../../../../.. (5 levels, unchanged from original)
